Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total [Pure mass fraction] in Blood

en.name: Glycated hemoglobin (HbA1c) in blood
en.longDescription: ## Definition & Clinical Context Glycated hemoglobin (HbA1c) is the fraction of haemoglobin non-enzymatically glycated by glucose, used as the reference biomarker for long-term glycaemic control and as an accepted criterion for the diagnosis of diabetes mellitus (HbA1c ≥ 6.5% / ≥ 48 mmol/mol) [1]. The source data will typically be a single numeric result per patient-timestamp, produced by HPLC, immunoassay or capillary electrophoresis on a whole blood sample. Results are reported in two unit systems: **NGSP (%)**, the historical US/DCCT convention, and **IFCC (mmol/mol)**, the SI / European convention. The two are related by the NGSP-IFCC Master Equation `NGSP% = (0.915 × IFCC%) + 2.152` [1]. ## Included Concepts The set lists eight LOINC "Lab Test" concepts for HbA1c in blood (no LOINC Hierarchy with descendants is available in the loaded vocabulary), grouped by representation. ### HbA1c / total haemoglobin ratio - *3004410 / 4548-4 — Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood (LOINC)*: most widely used. - *3003309 / 4549-2 — Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by Electrophoresis (LOINC)* - *3005673 / 17856-6 — Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by HPLC (LOINC)* - *3007263 / 17855-8 — Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by calculation (LOINC)* - *40762352 / 59261-8 — Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by IFCC protocol (LOINC)*: IFCC-standardised, reported in mmol/mol. - *40765129 / 62388-4 — Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by JDS/JSCC protocol (LOINC)*: Japanese protocol. - *42869630 / 71875-9 — Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total [Pure mass fraction] in Blood (LOINC)*: dimensionless ratio variant. ### Mass concentration - *3034639 / 41995-2 — Hemoglobin A1c [Mass/volume] in Blood (LOINC)*: rarely used. **Note on units.** Recommended unit follows LOINC's `EXAMPLE_UCUM_UNITS`. For the ratio codes, NGSP reports use **`%`** (concept 8554 — percent), IFCC reports use **`mmol/mol`** (concept 9579 — millimole per mole). The `NGSP% ↔ IFCC mmol/mol` conversion is **affine, not multiplicative** (`IFCC [mmol/mol] = (NGSP[%] − 2.152) / 0.0915 ≈ 10.93 × NGSP[%] − 23.52`, derived from the master equation [1]). For this reason it is **not listed in `unit_conversions.json`** (which only supports multiplicative factors) and must be applied in downstream code. ## Excluded Concepts No concepts are explicitly excluded by name. The set deliberately omits: - *36032094 / 96595-4 — Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in DBS*: dried blood spot, different specimen. - **Cord blood and fetus specimens**: physiologically distinct from post-natal blood. - **HbA1c goal / target codes**: clinical observation, not a measurement. ## Mapping Notes - **Default concept** when the source reports an HbA1c value without specifying method: `3004410 / 4548-4 — Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood`. - **Source explicitly mentions HPLC, electrophoresis or another method**: map to the method-specific LOINC code if available. - **Source reports estimated average glucose (eAG)**: derived measurement, do **not** map to HbA1c. Out of scope. - **Do not confuse with**: fasting glucose, oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT), fructosamine (shorter-term glycation marker), glycated albumin. ## References [1] Sacks DB, Arnold M, Bakris GL, Bruns DE, Horvath AR, Lernmark Å, et al. Guidelines and recommendations for laboratory analysis in the diagnosis and management of diabetes mellitus. *Clin Chem*. 2023;69(8):808-68. Available: https://doi.org/10.1093/clinchem/hvad080 [2] Regenstrief Institute. LOINC code 4548-4 — Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood. Available: https://loinc.org/4548-4/
